data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Follow-up appointment scheduling', which is explicitly listed in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of follow-up appointments being scheduled or any related functionality. The prior steps focus on initial bookings and diagnostics but do not address follow-up appointments, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of follow-up appointment scheduling.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
